message:
Command `# Find what variable gates CTS step

echo "---"
# Find the gating var for CTS
grep -B5 -A5 "gating" /nix/store/zkzv2pzi9yp00dmvlcvkdh2kxykicfqk-python3.13-librelane-3.0.2/lib/python3.13/site-packages/librelane/steps/openroad.py | grep -A5 -B5 "CTS\|cts" | head -30` executed with exit code 0.
